China deposited its MLI instrument on 25 May 2022 with entry into force on 1 September 2022, and Singapore deposited on 21 December 2018 with entry into force on 1 April 2019. OECD peer-review materials record the China-Singapore agreement as an MLI-covered tax agreement and show MLI Article 7 (PPT) as applicable. The system does not determine PPT satisfaction automatically.
